summary: Comprehensive implementation plan for StadiaAI — a GenAI-powered smart stadium companion web app for FIFA World Cup 2026. Covers 8 major features (AI chatbot, stadium map, crowd intelligence, navigation, transport, accessibility, sustainability, and ops command center), full tech stack (HTML/CSS/JS + Gemini API), detailed file-by-file breakdown of all new files, design system with FIFA-themed dark palette, and verification plan.
